headline: Netflix Debuts OpenAI-Backed Search Engine That Lets You Discover Movies And TV Shows Based On Emotions, Not Just Titles
summary: Netflix is testing a new OpenAI-powered search tool that lets users find shows and movies based on emotions and mood, marking a major step forward in personalized content discovery.

headline: Elon Musk's Political Fallout Fuels Record Dump of Used Tesla Cars — Now Selling For Thousands Below Market Value
summary: A record number of Tesla owners are selling their vehicles amid backlash over Elon Musk's political affiliations, driving used Tesla listings up 67% year-over-year and pushing prices roughly $10,000 below those of competing EVs.

headline: Nvidia, Alphabet To Back OpenAI Co-Founder Ilya Sutskever's New AI Startup Safe Superintelligence: Report
summary: Alphabet and Nvidia have reportedly invested in Ilya Sutskever's $32 billion AI startup Safe Superintelligence, as tech giants deepen ties with top AI labs that also serve as major customers for their cloud and chip infrastructure.

headline: Consumer Tech News (April 7-April 11): US President Puts 90-Days Pause On Tariffs, Microsoft May Cut Jobs & More
summary: Trump's 90-day tariff pause boosts markets, while Michigan auto groups criticize him for not halting auto tariffs.

headline: Trump Grants Tariff Reprieve to Tech – Including From China - In Surprise Move
summary: President Trump has exempted a range of technology products, including some consumer electronics produced in China, from reciprocal tariffs.

headline: Warren Buffett's Wealth Grows Even Amid Tariff War and Global Market Turmoil
summary: In the midst of the global market sell-off triggered by President Trump's tariffs, Warren Buffett has seen a significant increase in his net worth.

headline: Elon Musk's Cybertruck Is Controversial, But Kids Love It
summary: The Tesla Cybertruck may be polarizing among adults, but it is a hit among children.

headline: Benzinga Bulls And Bears: Apple, Nike, US Steel — And The Markets Ride Out Ongoing Volatility
summary: Benzinga examined the prospects for many investors' favorite stocks over the last week — here's a look at some of our top stories.

headline: Trump Tariff Wars: China's New Rule To Exempt Nvidia, Qualcomm And Others From Levies, But These Chip Companies Will Be Hit With 125% Tariffs
summary: China's new chip origin rule spares U.S. designers like Nvidia, AMD, and Qualcomm from 125% tariffs by exempting Taiwan-fabricated chips, while penalizing U.S.-based manufacturers like Intel, GlobalFoundries, and Texas Instruments, reshaping the global semiconductor supply chain.

headline: Trump And Xi Jinping's Tariff Threats May Be 'Just For The LOLz,' Says Analyst: 'It's Not Like This Is A Great Financial Crisis'
summary: Amid escalating U.S.-China tariff threats, BCA Research's Marko Papic says the rhetoric may be largely performative "for the LOLz."
